arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko sends message to Arsenal as five-word update on January transfer offered
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko has emerged as a top target for Arsenal, with Gunners' chiefs having sanctioned a big-money move for the RB Leipzig star in this month's transfer window

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb - TV channel, live stream and KO time
arts.sum: Arsenal are scheduled to face Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League on Wednesday, January 22 with kick-off inked-in for 8pm at the Emirates Stadium. There are several streaming options available for Arsenal's Champions League match against Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given £60m price tag for game-changing transfer as sensational January bid prepared
arts.sum: Following that, numerous reports began emerging that claimed it was unlikely Cunha would sign a new contract and could in fact leave Molineux in the final week of the January transfer window. While both Arsenal and Manchester United were monitoring the situation, Premier League high-flyers Nottingham Forest had made him their top transfer target in January.

arts.ttl: What Benjamin Sesko did to send new Arsenal transfer message as shock Viktor Gyokeres call made
arts.sum: Sesko and Gyokeres have been the two names strongly linked with exits expected for both in 2025 from RB Leipzig and Sporting CP, respectively. Though Arsenal are in contact with Sesko's camp, a January loan move looks unlikely and a significant proposal arriving from Emirates Stadium is also hard to foresee.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta has made Arsenal transfer promise as Benjamin Sesko move in the balance
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and Arsenal are not willing to compromise on quality when it comes to signing players in January amid links to Benjamin Sesko. Mikel Arteta was asked by football.london earlier in the month whether the needs of the window would see the club's high bar for players in terms of quality loosen.

arts.ttl: Arsenal STEP UP January efforts for priority target Benjamin Sesko
arts.sum: Arsenal recently made a new approach for top target Benjamin Sesko, according to a report. Arsenal STEP UP January efforts for priority target Benjamin Sesko

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Dinamo Zagreb, Real Madrid v Salzburg, Celtic v Young Boys and more: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Updates from Wednesday’s big European games Live scoreboard | Sign up for Football Daily | Email Simon Ahead of tonight’s game Mikel Arteta has been talking about the power of music, and Ed Aarons has been hearing him do it: Music is very much part of our culture. We have music in a lot of different places, and I think music has the capacity to change your mood, to change your energy to a certain place. And I think it happens in all of us. You play a song and immediately you feel different, and we have certain songs that trigger something in our team because they have some history as well with us, and I will use it when we believe it’s the right way to do it. I have a lot, depending on the day, that’s what I’m saying. It’s not about my energy, and sometimes I play a song many, many times. I don’t know, it’s a feeling. That is something that we’ve done for many years now and it is part of training. We use music as another element of our training sessions to build the energy and change certain purposes that we want in the training session, and I think the players enjoy it. Depending on the day, sometimes certain players pick certain songs - the first song, the first two songs, the last song - it’s the same as in the dressing room really. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'To those interested': Sky journalist shares what Wolves plan to do with Matheus Cunha amid Forest and Arsenal links
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha is reportedly on course to be the subject of a club record bid from Nottingham Forest. The Wolves ace is...

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha to Arsenal latest with Gunners prepared to spend BIG on forward in January
arts.sum: Arsenal are desperate to sign a new striker this month following Gabriel Jesus' injury, with club chiefs now sanctioning a major spending spree for the final weeks of the window

arts.ttl: PSG vs Manchester City - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as the Citizens bid to get back on track in Europe plus updates from Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as PSG host Man City at the Parc des Princes plus updates from Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League.
